allow:
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome"
  activate
  set URL of active tab of first window to "http://localhost:4000/"
end tell' && sleep 2 && screencapture /tmp/landing_page2.png)
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Finder" to close every window' 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate'; sleep 2; screencapture /tmp/landing_page3.png)
